name: SBI Card MILES ELITE

domestic: 8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits every year, capped at 2 visits per quarter.
1 additional domestic airport lounge visit is unlocked on every Rs 1 lakh spend, capped at 15 additional visits per year.
international: Complimentary Priority Pass membership worth $99 is provided for the first 2 years.
6 complimentary international airport lounge visits every year, capped at 2 visits per quarter.

joiningBenefits: 5,000 Travel Credits on spends of Rs 1 lakh within 60 days of card issuance, credited on payment of joining fee

milestones.label: 20,000 bonus Travel Credits on annual spends of Rs 12 lakh

milestoneBenefits: 20,000 bonus Travel Credits on annual spends of Rs 12 lakh
additionalBenefits: Flight cancellation cover up to 6 times per year at Rs 3,500 each
Air accident cover up to Rs 1 crore
Lost card liability cover up to Rs 1 lakh
Loss of travel documents cover up to Rs 12,500
Loss of checked-in baggage cover up to Rs 72,000
Delay of checked-in baggage cover of Rs 7,500
1% fuel surcharge waiver up to Rs 500 per month on eligible fuel spends from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000

salaried: Stable income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location
selfEmployed: Stable business income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location

additionalDetails: 1 Travel Credit = Re 1 for air mile or hotel point conversion
1 Travel Credit = Rs 0.50 for travel bookings
1 Travel Credit = Rs 0.25 for Shop & Smile product catalogue
internalNotes: Audited against official SBI Card MILES ELITE product page and current MILES ELITE T&C booklet on 2026-06-08.
The product page currently lists Mastercard and RuPay lounge-program references for domestic lounge access.
The card is audited from official SBI sources but is not yet marked as manually verified by user.
